Records.description: Three-loop massless off-shell two-point self-energy obtained from the two-loop master by replacing the central (k-q) propagator with a one-loop bubble insertion (Q and Q-s with s=q-k, two parallel propagators). The integral is reduced loop-by-loop: a one-loop self-energy in Q gives a shifted exponent for the central edge of the master, yielding a closed-form expression involving Gamma functions, cos(pi*D), and a single 3F2 hypergeometric of unit argument. Result agrees with Hathrell, Eq. (8.13).
Records.familyName: Massless three-loop two-point self-energy (6 propagators, bubble insertion on master)
